content.en:
Strictly speaking, the three-element integration is a cultivation type of origin divine power of the unity of essence and spirit, and Ye Tian has always been cultivating this origin divine power.

It was precisely because of the strength of this Origin Divine Power that Ye Tian's Divine Soul and Chaos Divine Power could keep up with the growth of physical strength.

Ye Tian cultivated the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique, and his physical body rose rapidly, it stands to reason that even if the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique can increase the strength of the Divine Soul and divine power, it is not a real Divine Soul and Divine Power Technique after all, it is just a physical alchemy technique.

But with the three-in-one, Ye Tian could freely transform his essence and spirit, so it was not difficult for him to improve his divine soul and divine power.

The triadic can also be used in battle.

For example, if his physical strength is 10 points, the divine soul power is 6 points, and the divine power is 7 points, then he can cast a three-element combination and transform the physical power into divine soul power.

In this way, his Divine Soul Power can burst out with 16 points of terrifying attack power, and if he converts his Divine Power into Divine Soul Power, he can burst out with 23 points of attack power.

Anyone's divine soul must be one of the weaker among the essence spirits, unless it is some special race that specializes in cultivating divine souls, then it will be dominated by divine souls.

But the ten true monarchs in front of him are not based on divine souls, but mainly on physical bodies and divine powers.

Previously, Ye Tian had cast God Destruction on them, but since they also had soul half-dao weapons on their bodies, under the condition that the soul gap was not worlds apart, even if they used a divine soul origin divine power like God Destroyer, it would be difficult to annihilate their divine souls.

But once Ye Tian cast the three-element unity, transformed the physical power and divine power into divine souls, and then inflicted a god-destroying blow on them, there was definitely hope to kill a true monarch.

"Just choose him!"

Ye Tian's attention was on the Iron-Blooded True Monarch of the Blood Moon Sect, one of the Ten True Monarchs.

This iron-blooded true monarch is only the 110th true monarch on the true monarch list, compared to Ye Tian, his strength is very weak and weak, but now under the increase of strange things, his combat power is not weak.

In addition, this iron-blooded true monarch has created an iron-blooded true body's origin divine power, and his physical defense is very strong, and his life-saving ability is very powerful.

But his divine soul strength is not high, and he is the bottom of the top ten true monarchs.

Once the Iron Blood True Monarch was killed, Ye Tian's pressure would drop greatly.

"Three-in-one!"

"Destroy the gods!"

"Iron-blooded True Monarch, let me die!"

Ye Tian's triadic integration and god annihilation were almost completed in a single thought.

Now.

The Iron Blood True Monarch's heart trembled, as if a great terror had descended.

He realized that he was in danger and wanted to dodge, but Ye Tian's God Destroying Strike was difficult to dodge, and he almost ignored the defense, although he was intercepted by the Soul Defense Half-Dao Weapon of the Iron Blood True Monarch, he couldn't intercept all of them, and could only intercept eighty percent of the attacks.

And the remaining twenty percent of the power is still a soul attack that the Iron-Blooded True Monarch can't resist.

Rumble!!!!

The movements of the Iron-Blooded True Monarch stagnated, his breath quickly dissipated, and his eyes lost their luster in an instant.

The Iron-Blooded True Monarch has fallen and died!

This scene was completely unexpected by everyone!

And due to the fall of the Iron-Blooded True Monarch, the formation of the Ten True Monarchs was forced, and there was no reaction for a while.

Taking advantage of this opportunity, Ye Tian struck the Nine True Monarchs and injured them.

"The Iron Warrior has fallen, how can this !!?"

"It's a divine soul attack, and the divine soul attack of the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi can kill the Iron Blood True Monarch in seconds!"

"When he attacked before, he couldn't kill the Iron Blood True Monarch, why did the power of the Divine Soul attack suddenly skyrocket?"

All of a sudden, the Nine True Monarchs panicked.

At this moment, Ye Tian once again performed a god annihilation and a three-element integration.

This time, another True Monarch has fallen.

There were only eight of the Ten True Monarchs left, and the scales of victory were tilted in favor of Ye Tian.

"According to the strength of my divine soul, if I use one blow with all my strength to destroy the gods and the three-in-one, it will consume a lot of divine souls, and I can only cast them three times at a time, but I can take the innate origin thing to quickly restore the power of the divine soul!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, for the sake of safety, it was impossible for Ye Tian to cast three god-destroying attacks at once, otherwise the gap in the weakness of the divine soul would be prone to accidents.

So, Ye Tian performed a god-destroying attack every once in a while.

With the fall of one true monarch after another, the five major forces were in a panic.

These true monarchs are not weak true monarchs, but the rulers or number two people of the top powers, and they are all true monarchs at the forefront of the true monarch list!

Such a true monarch, there are only one or two of each top power in an era, and the loss of one is even more heart-wrenching than the loss of a true ancestor!

The other True Monarchs wanted to escape, but once the six-sided dice were cast, there was no way to unravel them, so they could only wait for the power of the six-sided dice to run out, or all the people who cast them would fall.

"Wanfa Daozi, we admit defeat!"

The four True Monarchs who were still alive begged for mercy.

Ye Tian ignored them and ignored them at all.

Before, they were at an advantage, so why did they ever think of letting him go?

Now, they are at a disadvantage, and they want to stop and live?

If you offend him, there is only one way, and that is death!

Soon, the four True Monarchs fell and died one by one.

With the fall of the Ten True Monarchs, the six-sided dice also lost their power support, quickly disintegrated and dissipated between heaven and earth, and such a magical chaotic strange thing disappeared.

"Wanfa Daozi, you are looking for death!!!"

A cold cheer came.

Among them is the Ghost Shadow True Monarch!

The Ghost Shadow True Monarch was also angry, this time their Dark God Temple sent two True Monarchs to list the True Monarchs, and they were the two strongest True Monarchs to list the True Monarchs, and they all fell.

Now, although there are still a few True Monarchs in the Dark Temple, they are relatively weak True Monarchs.

At the True Monarch level, there are almost no people left in their Dark God Temple now.

Such a loss is too great!

Therefore, the Ghost Shadow True Monarch hated Ye Tian to the core, and wanted to kill Ye Tian at all costs.

However, the Ghost Shadow True Monarch was stopped by Long Hai True Monarch!

In fact, the Ghost Shadow True Monarch is not as powerful as the Longhai True Monarch, plus the Longhai True Monarch has the blessing of the Void Heaven True Country, and it is even more so that the Ghost Shadow True Monarch is beaten.

It's just that the Ghost Shadow True Monarch has a lot of hole cards, so he can stop the Dragon Sea True Monarch, but he just barely resists.

Now, Longhai Zhenjun wants to stop the Ghost Shadow Zhenjun, it is really very easy!

"Ghost Shadow True Monarch, you want to kill our Void Heaven Temple's Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, it's a dream. Moreover, if you don't leave, be careful of falling into the Void Heaven True Kingdom!"

Long Hai Zhenjun said with a smile.

"Damn it!"

The Ghost Shadow True Monarch scolded secretly.

In order to stop Longhai Zhenjun before, he even used strange objects, but he was still injured.

Now, his injuries are getting worse and worse, and if he doesn't leave the Void Heaven True Country, he may really fall.

"It's not over!"

After the Ghost Shadow True Monarch left these words, he instantly tore apart the space of the Void Heaven True Kingdom and left the Void Heaven True Kingdom.

The other side.

Ye Tian forcibly killed the ten True Monarchs of the True Monarch List, and it was the top ten True Monarchs after using a variety of strange things, but they were still killed by Ye Tian.

Now, Ye Tian has harvested a variety of strange things, and once these strange things are refined, his combat power is estimated to soar again.

"Who else wants to occupy this ruin?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Swept by Ye Tian's gaze, some True Monarchs subconsciously took a few steps back.

Whew!!!

A true gentleman left the place, not ready to participate.

This time, there are only tens of millions of True Monarchs they have arrived, although the high-end combat power is stronger than the Void Heaven Palace, but Ye Tian is too terrifying, one person is enough to easily kill a large number of them True Monarchs!

Sometimes in front of the strong, the number of people is of little use at all!

Just now, those ten True Monarchs couldn't kill Ye Tian with such a layout, which was enough to prove that Ye Tian's life-preserving ability and attack ability were too terrifying.

They don't want to die yet, they don't want to fight for a useless ruin.

Therefore, most of the true monarchs gave up.

After losing most of the True Monarchs, the other True Monarchs didn't dare to stay even if they had any ideas, otherwise they would really become corpses.

After a while, all the true monarchs of the major forces left.

In front of the entrance of the Black Wind Mountain Ruins, only the people of the human race and the true monarchs of the Void Heaven Temple remained.
